title: Lead SEO Specialist at Country Delight Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Lead SEO Specialist at Country Delight Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Country Delight Ventures Solutions! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Mysuru team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Country Delight Ventures Solutions:
Country Delight Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Country Delight Ventures Solutions!
